hero.title: Study in the heart of London's most iconic park.
hero.subtitle: Join over 4,000 students from 140 nationalities at a campus surrounded by Regent's Park — and a community that inspires you to think bigger.

content_tiles.heading: A Different Kind of University Experience
content_tiles.body: For over a century, Regent's has brought together students from around the world in an environment defined by proximity, perspective and possibility.

tiles.heading: Learn in the Heart of London
tiles.body: Study in Regent's Park, one of London's most beautiful campuses, surrounded by global culture, business and creative industries.

tiles.heading: Small Classes. Global Minds.
tiles.body: Our intimate seminars bring together students from over 140 nationalities, creating discussions that go far beyond the classroom.

tiles.heading: Career-Ready from Day One
tiles.body: Industry projects, internships and global partnerships ensure your degree leads directly to opportunity from the moment you arrive.

who_we_are.heading: Become a Leader and Innovator in Global Luxury

video.title: Life at Regent's University London
video.attribution: A unique university in the heart of London's Royal Regent's Park

body: Regent's University London is an independent, private university in the heart of Regent's Park. For over a century, we have brought together students from around the world in an environment defined by proximity, perspective and possibility.
Our personalised approach ensures every student receives the individual attention, industry connections, and international perspective they need to build a meaningful career.

cards.heading: Undergraduate
cards.summary: Three-year degrees designed around the individual with direct access to faculty and a truly international classroom.

image.alt: Regent's University undergraduate students in the library

cards.heading: Postgraduate
cards.summary: Masters programmes that combine specialist knowledge with the professional networks to accelerate your career.

cards.heading: Foundation
cards.summary: A tailored pathway preparing students for undergraduate study, developing academic skills and English language proficiency.

image.alt: Foundation students in a Regent's studio

cards.heading: School of English
cards.summary: Intensive English language programmes for professionals and students in the heart of one of the world's great cities.

image.alt: School of English students at Regent's University

cards.name: Jason Drew
cards.quote: Studying with classmates from around the world prepared me for every challenge of a global career.

cards.name: Priya Sharma
cards.quote: The campus in Regent's Park is unlike anywhere else — it genuinely feels like home.

cards.name: Dr Emma Carlisle
cards.quote: Being surrounded by creative industries every day pushes my research in ways I never expected.

cards.name: Marcus Webb
cards.quote: My international network from Regent's has been invaluable — doors open because of who you meet here.

cards.name: Sofia Reyes
cards.quote: The support from tutors was unlike anything I expected — they genuinely invest in your success.

cards.heading: Business and Psychology
cards.description: Use psychological insights to analyse behaviour and drive innovation in modern organisations.

cards.heading: Luxury Hospitality Management
cards.description: Learn to serve, lead and innovate in the luxury hospitality sector at the heart of global tourism.

cards.heading: Global Art Markets
cards.description: Explore the drivers, dynamics and future of today's global art markets across London and beyond.

open_days.heading: Experience Regent's for Yourself
open_days.body: The best way to discover if Regent's is the right place for you is to visit our campus. Meet academics, explore our facilities and talk to current students at one of our open days.

insights.heading: Ideas Shaping Tomorrow
insights.description: Insights, achievements and perspectives from the Regent's Community.

cards.heading: Film and Screen Production students and staff at Aesthetica Short Film Festival 2025

accreditations.heading: Global Recognition
accreditations.description: Recognised by leading academic bodies and professional organisations worldwide.

vice_chancellor.heading: Message from our Vice-Chancellor
vice_chancellor.col_body: Vice-Chancellor Geoff Smith shares his vision for Regent's and how the university prepares students to succeed in a global world.

apply_journey.heading: Your Journey Starts Here
apply_journey.body: Applying to Regent's is straightforward. Follow these three steps to begin your journey with us.

cards.heading: Find Your Course
cards.summary: Browse over 60 undergraduate and postgraduate programmes across business, arts, law, and social sciences.

cards.heading: Prepare Your Application
cards.summary: Gather your personal statement, academic references and supporting documents — we'll guide you through every requirement.

cards.heading: Visit Us at an Open Day
cards.summary: Meet academics, explore the campus and get a real feel for life at Regent's before you make your decision.

image.alt: Students at a Regent's open day

cta_banner.heading: Get the Latest from Regent's
cta_banner.body: Receive news, event invitations and the latest updates from Regent's University London directly to your inbox.
